commands.review_summary:
The PR replaces a fixed 100 ms sleep in the Android stale TLS probe auth test with a bounded polling loop and timeout message.

Reproducibility: no. high-confidence failing reproduction was established. Current main has a fixed 100 ms wait after asynchronous TLS probe cleanup, which makes the flake source-plausible, but no failing CI log or local Android run was proven here.
commands.review_followup: No automated repair branch is needed; the actionable blocker is a contributor PR-body proof update and required check rerun.

target.title: test(android): poll for stale TLS probe cleanup in auth test
target.body:
## Summary

- Problem: `connect_ignoresStaleTlsProbeAfterDisconnect` used a fixed `Thread.sleep(100)` before asserting async TLS probe cleanup after disconnect.
- Why it matters: Under CI load, 100ms may be insufficient, causing flaky unit test failures.
- What changed: Replaced fixed sleep with a 3s polling loop (10ms interval) that waits until `pendingGatewayTrust` and node-session `desiredBootstrapToken` are both null, with an explicit timeout error.
- What did NOT change (scope boundary): No production/runtime Android code; only the one test method.

## Change Type (select all)

- [x] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Refactor required for the fix
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Security hardening
- [ ] Chore/infra

## Scope (select all touched areas)

- [ ] Gateway / orchestration
- [ ] Skills / tool execution
- [ ] Auth / tokens
- [ ] Memory / storage
- [ ] Integrations
- [ ] API / contracts
- [ ] UI / DX
- [x] CI/CD / infra

## Linked Issue/PR

- Closes #<issue-number>
- Related #
- [x] This PR fixes a bug or regression

## Real behavior proof (required for external PRs)

- Behavior or issue addressed: Flaky/fixed-timing wait in `GatewayBootstrapAuthTest.connect_ignoresStaleTlsProbeAfterDisconnect`.
- Real environment tested: macOS, Android SDK at `~/Library/Android/sdk`, Android Studio JBR 21, Robolectric unit test.
- Exact steps or command run after this patch:
  ```bash
  export JAVA_HOME="/Applications/Android Studio.app/Contents/jbr/Contents/Home"
  cd apps/android && ./gradlew :app:testPlayDebugUnitTest \
    --tests "ai.openclaw.app.GatewayBootstrapAuthTest.connect_ignoresStaleTlsProbeAfterDisconnect" \
    -Dorg.gradle.java.home="$JAVA_HOME"
target.author: neatguycoding
